# programs.opengamepadui

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.opengamepadui`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.opengamepadui.args` | `list of string` | Arguments to be passed to OpenGamepadUI |
| `programs.opengamepadui.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable opengamepadui. |
| `programs.opengamepadui.extraPackages` | `list of package` | Additional packages to add to the OpenGamepadUI environment. |
| `programs.opengamepadui.fontPackages` | `list of package` | Font packages to use in OpenGamepadUI. Defaults to system fonts, but could be overridden to use other fonts — useful for users who would like to customize CJK fonts used in opengamepadui. According to the [upstream issue](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/opengamepadui-for-linux/issues/10422#issuecomment-1944396010), opengamepadui only follows the per-user fontconfig configuration. |
| `programs.opengamepadui.gamescopeSession` | `submodule` | Run a GameScope driven OpenGamepadUI session from your display-manager |
| `programs.opengamepadui.gamescopeSession.args` | `list of string` | Arguments to be passed to GameScope for the session. |
| `programs.opengamepadui.gamescopeSession.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable GameScope Session. |
| `programs.opengamepadui.gamescopeSession.env` | `attribute set of string` | Environmental variables to be passed to GameScope for the session. |
| `programs.opengamepadui.inputplumber.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Run InputPlumber service for input management and gamepad configuration. . |
| `programs.opengamepadui.package` | `package` | The OpenGamepadUI package to use. |
| `programs.opengamepadui.powerstation.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Run PowerStation service for TDP control and performance settings. . |
